title: Contact Us
metaDescription: Contact Rosehill College for payments, reporting absences, student services, enrolment, international students, adult education, the school nurse, and campus location details.

sections.heading: Contact us
sections.lede: Front office reception is open 8.00am to 4.00pm — phone 09 295 0661. For anything else, the right contact is below.

items.text:
Free call 0800 RCAWAY (0800 722 929)
Email attendance@rosehillcollege.school.nz
Or report via the SchoolBridge app

Phone 09 295 0661 (ext 824 or 884)
Email internationaldepartment@rosehillcollege.school.nz
24-hour emergency line 027 463 0267

The 2026 programme is now available — Term 1 courses start in early February.
rosehilladultlearn.co.nz · 09 636 9060 · ace@rosehillcollege.school.nz
Contact details for teaching staff are on Our Staff.

sections.heading: Payments to Rosehill College
sections.html:
Payments to Rosehill College can be made by cash, EFTPOS (at the student office), or internet banking.

Bank account details
Account name: Rosehill College Board
Account number: 12-3031-0837472-000

When making an online payment, please include the following details in your reference fields to ensure it is correctly allocated:

  • Student name
  • Student ID
  • Reference — e.g. "Camp Fees", "Trip", "Uniform"

Email: accounts@rosehillcollege.school.nz

sections.heading: Absences — procedures for parents
sections.lede: Our staff use the Electronic Attendance Register (eAR) for real-time tracking of student attendance. Early Notification sends a text message to parents of students whose non-attendance is unexplained, and attendance is visible 24/7 on the password-protected web portal.

items.title: Reporting an absence
items.html:
If your student is absent from school, please phone the Attendance Officer on 295 0661 ext 869 or 0800 RCAWAY (0800 722 929) at any time and leave a message. You can also report via the SchoolBridge app, or email attendance@rosehillcollege.school.nz.

If you receive a text message notifying of an absence: reply to the text, phone our Attendance Officer, or provide a note explaining the student's absence.

items.title: Leaving school during the day
items.html:
• Please provide a note for your student to take to their Head of House at the start of the day.
  • The student will obtain an 'Exit Permit' which they present at the Student Office before they leave the school grounds.

Year 9–12 students may not leave the school grounds without permission. We need to know where students are at all times.

items.title: If a student is unwell at school
items.html:
• The student should go to the nurse with permission of the teacher.
  • Students are not permitted to privately contact their parents and leave the school grounds without clearance from school staff.

items.title: Arriving late
items.html:
• Late to the first period: the student must go straight to their class to sign in late and provide a note to their Manaakitia Mai teacher.
  • Late after Period 1: the student must sign in at the Student Office and provide a note from the parent/caregiver advising the reason — or the parent/caregiver should phone the Attendance Officer and leave a message.

items.title: Long-term absence (more than four days)
items.html:
If the student will be absent during term time for an extended period — please advise date of absence, return date and reason for absence by one of the following methods:

  • Phone the Attendance Officer on 295 0661 ext 869 or 0800 722 929; or
  • Send a letter addressed to Principal, Rosehill College, PO Box 72546, Papakura 2244; or
  • Email attendance@rosehillcollege.school.nz.

sections.heading: Send us a message
sections.lede: For enrolment, international student or general enquiries.
